title: Cups on the floor Recycled Imagery
display_title: Cups on the floor Recycled Imagery
wikitext:
[]: Cups on the floor! Recycled Imagery (rebuild spoilers)             Quote Post by Naz » Thu Jan 17, 2008 3:13 pm Did anyone else's mind immediately go to the coffee on the floor scene of EoE when they saw this in Rebuild 1.0? See below: I'm sure the vast majority remember the same coffee pot going on the floor in the series only to see it again in the movie with new imagery laced around the same time frame, giving us a whole new spin on an old scene. I may be shooting in the dark here but I wouldn't be too suprised if they did something like that again across the movies; I nominate that the scene will be none other than the cup above! I don't know how much recycled imagery they plan on using or not but when I saw that I felt like I was going to see it again. Maybe this is too farfetched but did anyone else get any significance out of this shot (or noticed recycled imagery at work in other shots) or is it way too early to speculate?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Jan 17, 2008 3:28 pm That particular bit of hand imagery is also a fairly recurring one in the original anime. It shows up shortly before the kitchen scene, as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Szmitten » Thu Jan 17, 2008 6:29 pm All I thought was "You made me drop my soda...you shall die before the final movie". To be honest, I didn't see it, and I'm not sure I do. Spilt soda is just a spilt drink, spilt coffee can be scalding. I'm not sure what point I'm making, but I don't find them particularly comparable. I would be more interested if it occurs in the Rebuild continuity again. Then again, this could be considered somewhat overly analytical. I mean, there are a very limited number of ways for a drink to spill.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 17, 2008 7:42 pm @ Naz: If you want recycled footage of the Coffeepot, see the DC of 24'. It's not just a similar scene from EoE, it's the EXACT SAME FOOTAGE. @_@ If it's something that happens a few times, then yes it could be alluding to that. But otherwise I think it's just overanalyzing. *shrugs*

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 17, 2008 7:57 pm Szmitten wrote: Then again, this could be considered somewhat overly analytical. I mean, there are a very limited number of ways for a drink to spill.

[]:             Quote Post by Naz » Fri Jan 18, 2008 12:28 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: @ Naz: If you want recycled footage of the Coffeepot, see the DC of 24'. It's not just a similar scene from EoE, it's the EXACT SAME FOOTAGE. @_@
